apod_title: The Red Glow of the Cosmic Bat Nebula
label: namecode - NEBULA | 12 ly
prompt: Cinematic dark monochrome generative art inspired by The Red Glow of the Cosmic Bat Nebula. This Cosmic Bat wishes you a happy Summerween! This mid-year celebration of Halloween transcends hemispheres, even though summer in the Northern hemisphere is winter in the South. Contrary to its Rendered as fine white particles and light filaments on a pure black background, volumetric, dramatic, monochrome white on black, lots of negative space, high detail.
